title: coelogyne fimbriata var. fimbriata
intro: Coelogyne fimbriata var. fimbriata, also known as the beaked orchid, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Coelogyne fimbriata var. fimbriata include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which help to reduce inflammation and lower body temperature, as well as its expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
